pi_items.verified_value: All columns are valid VitalDB track names. ART: Arterial pressure (SNUADC/ART, Solar8000/ART_*), ECG: Electrocardiogram (SNUADC/ECG_II, SNUADC/ECG_V5), PLETH: Plethysmography (SNUADC/PLETH, Solar8000/PLETH_*), CO2: Capnography (Solar8000/ETCO2, Primus/CO2), AWP: Airway pressure (Primus/AWP), BIS: Bispectral index (BIS/BIS, BIS/EEG1_WAV), SEVO: Sevoflurane (Primus/EXP_SEVO, Primus/INSP_SEVO)
pi_items.source: PhysioNet VitalDB track_names.csv file lists all these as available physiological signals
verifier.py line 117 reads pass_threshold from metadata; default used is 60; verified at line 460 for pass condition

privileged_info_summary: The export_intraoperative_segment task operates on case 0001 from the publicly available VitalDB dataset (vitaldb.net, PhysioNet), containing real de-identified perioperative vital signs data from a 77-year-old male patient undergoing low anterior resection (colorectal surgery) at Seoul National University Hospital. The case has a total duration of 3 hours 12 minutes 22 seconds (11,542 seconds), with the intraoperative period spanning from 27:48 to 2:52:48 (1,668 to 10,368 seconds), representing approximately 145 minutes or 8,700 seconds of surgical time. The dataset includes multiple physiological signals including arterial blood pressure (ART), electrocardiogram (ECG), pulse oximetry (PLETH), capnography (CO2), airway pressure (AWP), bispectral index (BIS), and sevoflurane anesthetic concentration (SEVO), all of which are confirmed as available in the VitalDB track repository. All timing metadata has been independently verified against the official VitalDB clinical_data.csv from PhysioNet.
